programs.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programs.desc: James tackles the master bedroom renovation of his holiday rental home and starts to think about how to market it.

programs.title: Escape to Florida
programs.desc: The Best of British pub prepares for St George's Day. Donna and Dan's son Billy chases his soccer dream. And Justine has luxury flats to sell and a sunset cruise to plan.

programs.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programs.desc: In Alicante, the Rodriguezes help Katy and Mo move one step closer to their ideal lifestyle. In Málaga, can the Hamiltons find Tim and Sharon 'the one' or will there be divisions.

programs.title: A Place in the Sun
programs.desc: Colin and Richard have been holidaying in Playa del Inglés on Gran Canaria for over 20 years, and now want to buy a holiday home there. Jean Johansson shows them what their £200k can buy.
